en: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.
zh: 猶大的兒子是法勒斯、希斯崙、迦米、戶珥和朔巴。

en: Reaiah the son of Shobal fathered Jahath, and Jahath fathered Ahumai and Lahad. These were the clans of the Zorathites.
zh: 朔巴的兒子利亞雅生雅哈；雅哈生亞戶買和拉哈。以上這些都是瑣拉人的家族。

en: These were the sons of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Haz-zelelponi,
zh: 以坦的兒子 是：耶斯列、伊施瑪、伊得巴；他們的妹妹名叫哈悉勒玻尼。

en: and Penuel fathered Gedor, and Ezer fathered Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.
zh: 基多的父親是毘努伊勒；戶沙的父親是以謝珥；這些都是伯利恆的父親以法他的長子戶珥所生的。

en: Ashhur, the father of Tekoa, had two wives, Helah and Naarah;
zh: 提哥亞的父親亞施戶有兩個妻子，就是希拉和拿拉。

en: Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
zh: 拿拉給亞施戶生了亞戶撒、希弗、提米尼、哈轄斯他利；這些人都是拿拉的兒子。

en: The sons of Helah: Zereth, Izhar, and Ethnan.
zh: 希拉的兒子是洗列、瑣轄和伊提南。

en: Koz fathered Anub, Zobebah, and the clans of Aharhel, the son of Harum.
zh: 哥斯生亞諾、瑣比巴和哈崙的兒子亞哈黑的眾家族。

en: Jabez was more honorable than his brothers; and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, "Because I bore him in pain."
zh: 雅比斯在眾兄弟中最受人尊重，他母親給他起名叫雅比斯，意思說：“我生產時十分痛苦。”

en: Jabez called upon the God of Israel, saying, "Oh that you would bless me and enlarge my border, and that your hand might be with me, and that you would keep me from harm so that it might not bring me pain!" And God granted what he asked.
zh: 雅比斯呼求以色列的 神說：“深願你大大地賜福給我，擴張我的境界，你的能力常與我同在，保護我免遭災禍，不受痛苦。” 神就應允了他所求的。

en: Chelub, the brother of Shuhah, fathered Mehir, who fathered Eshton.
zh: 書哈的兄弟基綠生米黑；米黑是伊施屯的父親。

en: Eshton fathered Beth-rapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah, the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.
zh: 伊施屯生伯拉巴、巴西亞和珥拿轄的父親提欣拿；這些都是利迦人。

en: The sons of Kenaz: Othniel and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath and Meonothai.
zh: 基納斯的兒子是俄陀聶和西萊雅；俄陀聶的兒子是哈塔和憫挪太 。

en: Meonothai fathered Ophrah; and Seraiah fathered Joab, the father of Ge-harashim, so-called because they were craftsmen.
zh: 憫挪太生俄弗拉。西萊雅生革．夏納欣人的祖先約押；他們原是匠人。

en: The sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the son of Elah: Kenaz.
zh: 耶孚尼的兒子是迦勒；迦勒的兒子是以路、以拉和拿安；以拉的兒子是基納斯。

en: The sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
zh: 耶哈利勒的兒子是西弗、西法、提利和亞撒列。

en: The sons of Ezrah: Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon. These are the sons of Bithiah, the daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered married; and she conceived and bore Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah, the father of Eshtemoa.
zh: 以斯拉的兒子是益帖、米列、以弗和雅倫。米列娶法老的女兒比提雅為妻；比提雅懷孕，生了米利暗、沙買和以實提摩的父親益巴。米列的猶大妻子生了基多的父親雅列、梭哥的父親希伯和撒挪亞的父親耶古鐵。

en: And his Judahite wife bore Jered the father of Gedor, Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah.
The sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the fathers of Keilah the Garmite and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.
zh: 荷第雅的妻子、拿含的妹妹的兒子是迦米人基伊拉的父親和瑪迦人以實提摩的父親。

en: The sons of Shimon: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. The sons of Ishi: Zoheth and Ben-zoheth.
zh: 示門的兒子是暗嫩、林拿、便．哈南和提倫。以示的兒子是梭黑和便．梭黑。

en: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah: Er the father of Lecah, Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the clans of the house of linen workers at Beth-ashbea;
zh: 猶大的兒子是示拉；示拉的兒子是利迦的父親珥、瑪利沙的父親拉大，以及在伯亞實比織造細麻布的眾家族。

en: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who ruled in Moab and returned to Lehem (now the records are ancient).
zh: 還有約敬、哥西巴人、約阿施和薩拉，他們曾統治摩押地，又有雅叔比利恆。這都是古代的記載。

en: These were the potters who were inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah. They lived there in the king's service.
zh: 他們都是陶匠，是尼他應和基低拉的居民；他們與王一起住在那裡，為王作工。

en: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;
zh: 西緬的兒子是尼母利、雅憫、雅立、謝拉和掃羅。

en: Shallum was his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
zh: 掃羅的兒子是沙龍；沙龍的兒子是米比衫；米比衫的兒子是米施瑪。

en: The sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.
zh: 米施瑪的子孫如下：米施瑪的兒子是哈母利；哈母利的兒子是撒刻；撒刻的兒子是示每。

en: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brothers did not have many children, nor did all their clan multiply like the men of Judah.
zh: 示每有十六個兒子，六個女兒；他兄弟們的兒女卻不多；他們各家的兒女，都不如猶大族的子孫那樣多。

en: They lived in Beersheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual,
zh: 他們住在別是巴、摩拉大、哈薩．書亞、

en: Bilhah, Ezem, Tolad,
zh: 辟拉、以森、陀臘、

en: Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag,
zh: 彼土利、何珥瑪、洗革拉、

en: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-su-sim, Beth-biri, and Shaaraim. These were their cities until David reigned.
zh: 伯．瑪嘉博、哈薩．蘇撒、伯．比利和沙拉音。直到大衛王的時代，這些都是他們的城市，

en: And their villages were Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan, five cities,
zh: 還有附近的村莊和以坦、亞因、臨門、陀健和亞珊等五座城，

en: along with all their villages that were around these cities as far as Baal. These were their settlements, and they kept a genealogical record.
zh: 以及這些城周圍所有的村莊，直到巴力。這是他們居住的地方，他們也有自己的族譜。

en: Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah the son of Amaziah,
zh: 還有米所巴、雅米勒、亞瑪謝的兒子約沙、

en: Joel, Jehu the son of Joshibiah, son of Seraiah, son of Asiel,
zh: 約珥、約示比的兒子耶戶；約示比是西萊雅的兒子，西萊雅是亞薛的兒子。

en: Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaiah,
zh: 還有以利約乃、雅哥巴、約朔海、亞帥雅、亞底業、耶西篾和比拿雅。

en: Ziza the son of Shiphi, son of Allon, son of Jedaiah, son of Shimri, son of Shemaiah-
zh: 示非的兒子是細撒；示非是亞龍的兒子，亞龍是耶大雅的兒子，耶大雅是申利的兒子；申利是示瑪雅的兒子。

en: these mentioned by name were princes in their clans, and their fathers' houses increased greatly.
zh: 以上所記的名字，都是各家族的領袖；他們的家族都很興旺。

en: They journeyed to the entrance of Gedor, to the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks,
zh: 他們往基多的關口去，直到山谷的東面，為自己的羊群尋找草場。

en: where they found rich, good pasture, and the land was very broad, quiet, and peaceful, for the former inhabitants there belonged to Ham.
zh: 他們找到了一塊肥美的草場；那地十分寬闊，又清靜、又安寧；從前住在那裡的是含族的人。

en: These, registered by name, came in the days of Hezekiah, king of Judah, and destroyed their tents and the Meunites who were found there, and marked them for destruction to this day, and settled in their place, because there was pasture there for their flocks.
zh: 以上這些有名字記錄的人，在猶大王希西家的日子，前來攻擊含族人的帳棚和那裡所有的米烏尼人，把他們完全毀滅，直到今日，並且住在他們的地方，因為那裡有草場，可以牧放他們的羊群。

en: And some of them, five hundred men of the Simeonites, went to Mount Seir, having as their leaders Pelatiah, Neariah, Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.
zh: 在西緬人中有五百人往西珥山去，他們的首領是以示的兒子毘拉提、尼利雅、利法雅和烏薛。

en: And they defeated the remnant of the Amalekites who had escaped, and they have lived there to this day.
zh: 他們擊殺了逃脫餘生的亞瑪力人，就住在那裡，直到今日。
